# Lotwaala

Lotwaala is an India-focused wholesale products marketplace app for retailers,
resellers, small businesses, wholesalers, and distributors. It helps buyers
discover verified wholesale suppliers by city and category.

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://lotwaala.com/
- About: https://lotwaala.com/about
- Contact: https://lotwaala.com/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://lotwaala.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://lotwaala.com/terms
- Editorial Policy: https://lotwaala.com/editorial-policy

## Wholesale Location Hubs

- Delhi: https://lotwaala.com/market/delhi
- Mumbai: https://lotwaala.com/market/mumbai
- Bangalore: https://lotwaala.com/market/bangalore
- Chennai: https://lotwaala.com/market/chennai
- Hyderabad: https://lotwaala.com/market/hyderabad
- Pune: https://lotwaala.com/market/pune
- Surat: https://lotwaala.com/market/surat
- Kolkata: https://lotwaala.com/market/kolkata
- Ahmedabad: https://lotwaala.com/market/ahmedabad
- Jaipur: https://lotwaala.com/market/jaipur

## Wholesale Category Hubs

- Electronics: https://lotwaala.com/market/category/electronics
- Clothing and Apparel: https://lotwaala.com/market/category/clothing
- Footwear: https://lotwaala.com/market/category/footwear
- FMCG and Grocery: https://lotwaala.com/market/category/fmcg
- Textiles and Fabrics: https://lotwaala.com/market/category/textiles
- Jewellery and Accessories: https://lotwaala.com/market/category/jewellery

- https://lotwaala.com/sitemap.xml
